name: Omer Simeon
abstract: Omer Victor Simeon (July 21, 1902 – September 17, 1959) was an American jazz clarinetist. He also played soprano, alto, and baritone saxophone and bass clarinet.

concerts.label: Jazz Concert in Memory of Sidney Bechet

about_quotes.speaker: Horace Henderson
about_quotes.evidence: I had Omer Simeon (unintelligible) with me. He played a beautiful clarinet.

about_quotes.speaker: Bud Freeman
about_quotes.evidence: I got an all-star band and incidentally, Omer Simeon was in that band.

about_quotes.speaker: Quinn Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: In the saxophone section, as I say, we had Darnell Howard, Omer Simeon on lead sax... And I was on string bass. Yeah, we were together about two or three years.

about_quotes.speaker: Russell Procope
about_quotes.evidence: he had Omer Sim?on, Barney Bigard and myself in the reed section.

about_quotes.speaker: Russell Procope
about_quotes.evidence: he had Omer Sim?on, Barney Bigard and myself in the reed section.

about_quotes.speaker: William Russell
about_quotes.evidence: Also, Omer Simeon, who was certainly one of the outstanding New Orleans clarinetists... But he was a member of Jelly Rolls band up there, and Jelly considered him the greatest clarinetist he'd ever worked with.
